creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 182076
patch

Hi,

Seen on the forum:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/60599/

lxde has switched to a new Consolkit interface to suspend / hibernate [1] and it's not compatible with the consolekit version we have in ports (we need consolekit-1.0.x, see bug #202269).

The attached patch fixes the problem (it reverts [1])

[1] https://github.com/lxde/lxsession/commit/3cdba6bbd47199232fd530f76474ee0b0d94a55a
